resources.string: Let ARTIFACE use expression and time-of-day cues when creating caricatures. This is artistic flair, not a personality or medical assessment.
When enabled later, only a broad place label may be used — never precise GPS. Requires contextual personalization.
This will remove saved caricatures from this device. Phase 5 wires the real deletion; for now nothing is stored yet.
Gallery is empty — nothing to clear yet.
ARTIFACE turns selfies into playful caricatures. Expression, time, and optional place cues may nudge the style — always for fun, never for judgement.
Photos stay in app storage on this device for the MVP. Contextual personalization is opt-in. Location context, when added, uses only a broad label after consent. No API keys live in the app.
